scenario.name: Unclear request scenario
scenario.goal: Clarify a vague request and get to the correct service.
end_when: The office has identified the correct service or department.
details: Avery starts with an unclear complaint, like 'I need help with a thing.'
Avery answers follow-up questions and becomes clearer over time.
Avery is trying to avoid sounding scripted.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I need help with a thing, I'm not really sure how to describe it.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: You go to AI. Am I speaking with Jordan

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: No, this is Avery Chen. I just need some help with something medical, but I'm not sure exactly who I should talk to or what the problem is called.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: No problem Avery. I can help get you to the right place.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Thanks. So I've been having this weird thing with my arm — it feels kind of heavy and tingly sometimes, but it's not like an injury or anything. I don't know if that's something you guys handle or if I need to see someone else.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Point Orthopedics treats, a wide range of joint. Muscle and nerve issues, including symptoms, like having a or tingling in the arm.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Oh okay, so orthopedics might be the right place then. What do I need to do to get seen for something like that?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Would like to schedule an appointment to have. Would you like to schedule an appointment to have your arm checked out? Or would you prefer to speak with a provider first about your symptoms?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I think scheduling an appointment makes sense if you think this is something you guys can help with. How long would I have to wait to get in?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Please provide your date of birth.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sure, it's May 14, 1991.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Just to confirm I have your name is Avery Chen and your date of birth as May 14th. 1991. Is that correct? If so, could you please spell your first and last name for me

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that's right. My first name is A-V-E-R-Y, and last name is C-H-E-N.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yeah, that should work. It's 555-123-4567.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Not sure. Just let please tell me the phone number. You have on file with us.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yeah, that should work. It's 555-123-4567.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I have your phone number as 5551234567 and your date of birth is May 14th. 1991. Is that correct?

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Yes, that's all correct.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: I can't receive further right now, but I can make sure our Clinic support team Falls up with you.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Okay, that works. So I just wait for them to call me, or is there anything else I need to do on my end?

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: Connecting you to a representative please. Wait hello you've reached the pretty good. AI test line goodbye.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Okay, thanks for your help. I'll wait for the follow-up call.
